modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't send email from Quickbooks in Office 2013.

full_description_text:  
I can't send email through Quickbooks. It just doesn't work when I try to send. I'm using Office 2013 and Quickbooks, and it’s really frustrating. I don’t know why it’s not sending emails like it should.
short_description: Can't send email from Quickbooks in Office 2013.
description: I can't send email through Quickbooks. It just doesn't work when I try to send. I'm using Office 2013 and Quickbooks, and it’s really frustrating. I don’t know why it’s not sending emails like it should.
